name: AA_SARF_PROJE_123
definition:
--SELECT * FROM AA_SARF_PROJE WHERE IS_EMRI_N0='RXL011'

CREATE VIEW [dbo].[AA_SARF_PROJE_123] AS


select 
--L.SOURCEINDEX AS AMBAR,
YEAR(F.DATE_) YEAR_
,MONTH(F.DATE_) MONTH_
,F.DATE_ DATE_
,F.FICHENO FISNO
,P.CODE IS_EMRI_N0
,P.NAME IS_EMRI_ADI
,P.ENDDATE ENDDATE
,S.CODE STOK_KODU
,S.NAME STOK_ADI
,AMOUNT MIKTAR
,U.CODE BRIM
-----ESKI SON
--,CASE WHEN L.PRICE<>0 THEN L.PRICE ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE LINETYPE=0 AND STOCKREF=L.STOCKREF AND PRICE<>0 AND  TRCODE IN (50,1) AND DATE_<=L.DATE_  ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) END BRIM_FIYAT
--,CASE WHEN L.PRICE<>0 THEN L.PRICE ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE LINETYPE=0 AND STOCKREF=L.STOCKREF AND PRICE<>0 AND  TRCODE IN (50,1) AND DATE_<=L.DATE_  ORDER BY DATE_ DESC)  END*L.AMOUNT  TUTAR
------------------YENI
	,CAST(CAST(
	ISNULL
	(CASE WHEN 
	
	(sELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=S.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=1 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE CARDREF=S.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
	ELSE (sELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE STOCKREF=S.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=1 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) END ,0) AS  DECIMAL(18,2)) AS float) AS BRIM_FIYAT
	--
		,CAST(CAST(
	ISNULL
	(CASE WHEN 
	
	(sELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=S.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=1 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE CARDREF=S.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
	ELSE (sELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE STOCKREF=S.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=1 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) END ,0) AS  DECIMAL(18,2)) AS float)*L.AMOUNT  TUTAR

---------------

,CASE SUBSTRING((SELECT CODE FROM LG_123_PROJECT WHERE LOGICALREF=L.PROJECTREF),1,2) 
WHEN 'G0' THEN 'GLADIATOR KABIN' 
WHEN 'G1' THEN 'GLADIATOR KABIN' 
WHEN 'R0' THEN 'RONIN KABIN'
WHEN 'RX' THEN 'RONIN XL'
WHEN 'FO' THEN 'RONIN KABINR'
WHEN 'F0' THEN 'FREDOOM'
WHEN 'T0' THEN 'TROY'
WHEN 'MC' THEN 'MOHICAN'
WHEN 'RV' THEN 'REVIVA'
WHEN 'GL' THEN 'GLADIATOR XL'
WHEN 'GL' THEN 'GLADIATOR XL'
WHEN 'PA' THEN 'PAN ANATOLIA' 
WHEN '20' THEN 'AKSESUAR' 
END TUR
,(SELECT MAX(MONTH(DATE_)) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE PROJECTREF=L.PROJECTREF AND TRCODE IN (7,8) ) SATIS_AY
,(SELECT MAX(YEAR(DATE_)) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE PROJECTREF=L.PROJECTREF AND TRCODE IN (7,8) ) SATIS_YIL
,CASE S.STGRPCODE WHEN 'ARABA' THEN 'ARABA' WHEN 'OTV' THEN 'OTV' ELSE
--CASE WHEN L.STOCKREF IN (SELECT STOCKREF FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE PROJECTREF=P.LOGICALREF AND TRCODE=1)
--THEN 'OPSIYONEL' ELSE 'STANDART' END END RECETE_TURU
CASE WHEN L.STOCKREF IN (SELECT STCREF FROM LG_123_STCOMPLN WHERE MAINCREF IN 
(SELECT STOCKREF FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE PROJECTREF=P.LOGICALREF AND TRCODE=1)) OR
 L.STOCKREF IN (SELECT STOCKREF FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE PROJECTREF=P.LOGICALREF AND TRCODE=1 AND LINENO_<>1)
 THEN 'OPSIYONEL' WHEN L.STOCKREF IN (SELECT STOCKREF FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE PROJECTREF=P.LOGICALREF AND TRCODE=1 AND LINENO_=1) THEN 'STANDART' ELSE  'STANDART' END END RECETE_TURU,
 P.CODE AS PROJE_KODU

FROM LG_123_01_STLINE AS L
INNER JOIN LG_123_01_STFICHE AS F ON F.LOGICALREF=L.STFICHEREF
INNER JOIN LG_123_ITEMS AS S ON S.LOGICALREF=L.STOCKREF
INNER JOIN LG_123_UNITSETL AS U ON U.LOGICALREF=L.UOMREF
INNER JOIN LG_123_PROJECT AS P ON P.LOGICALREF=L.PROJECTREF

WHERE F.TRCODE IN(25) AND L.SOURCEINDEX IN (2,11) AND  S.CARDTYPE<>11

--AND S.CODE='ELTS0099H070' AND P.CODE='RV029'
---AND P.CODE='G0255'

--8034

--SELECT * FROM LG_123_01_STFICHE WHERE FICHENO='001987'
--SELECT * FROM  LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE STFICHEREF=3081
UNION ALL

select 
--L.SOURCEINDEX AS AMBAR,
YEAR(F.DATE_) YEAR_
,MONTH(F.DATE_) MONTH_
,F.DATE_ DATE_
,F.FICHENO FISNO
,P.CODE IS_EMRI_N0
,P.NAME IS_EMRI_ADI
,P.ENDDATE ENDDATE
,S.CODE STOK_KODU
,S.NAME STOK_ADI
,AMOUNT MIKTAR
,U.CODE BRIM
-----ESKI SON
--,CASE WHEN L.PRICE<>0 THEN L.PRICE ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE LINETYPE=0 AND STOCKREF=L.STOCKREF AND PRICE<>0 AND  TRCODE IN (50,1) AND DATE_<=L.DATE_  ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) END BRIM_FIYAT
--,CASE WHEN L.PRICE<>0 THEN L.PRICE ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE LINETYPE=0 AND STOCKREF=L.STOCKREF AND PRICE<>0 AND  TRCODE IN (50,1) AND DATE_<=L.DATE_  ORDER BY DATE_ DESC)  END*L.AMOUNT  TUTAR
------------------YENI
	,CAST(CAST(
	ISNULL
	(CASE WHEN 
	
	(sELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=S.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=13 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE CARDREF=S.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
	ELSE (sELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE STOCKREF=S.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=13 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) END ,0) AS  DECIMAL(18,2)) AS float) AS BRIM_FIYAT
	--
		,CAST(CAST(
	ISNULL
	(CASE WHEN 
	
	(sELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=S.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=13 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE CARDREF=S.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
	ELSE (sELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE STOCKREF=S.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=13 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) END ,0) AS  DECIMAL(18,2)) AS float)*L.AMOUNT  TUTAR

---------------

,CASE SUBSTRING((SELECT CODE FROM LG_123_PROJECT WHERE LOGICALREF=L.PROJECTREF),1,2) 
WHEN 'G0' THEN 'GLADIATOR KABIN' 
WHEN 'G1' THEN 'GLADIATOR KABIN' 
WHEN 'R0' THEN 'RONIN KABIN'
WHEN 'RX' THEN 'RONIN XL'
WHEN 'FO' THEN 'RONIN KABINR'
WHEN 'F0' THEN 'FREDOOM'
WHEN 'T0' THEN 'TROY'
WHEN 'MC' THEN 'MOHICAN'
WHEN 'RV' THEN 'REVIVA'
WHEN 'GL' THEN 'GLADIATOR XL'
WHEN 'GL' THEN 'GLADIATOR XL'
WHEN 'PA' THEN 'PAN ANATOLIA' 
WHEN '20' THEN 'AKSESUAR' 
END TUR
,(SELECT MAX(MONTH(DATE_)) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE PROJECTREF=L.PROJECTREF AND TRCODE IN (7,8) ) SATIS_AY
,(SELECT MAX(YEAR(DATE_)) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE PROJECTREF=L.PROJECTREF AND TRCODE IN (7,8) ) SATIS_YIL
,CASE S.STGRPCODE WHEN 'ARABA' THEN 'ARABA' WHEN 'OTV' THEN 'OTV' ELSE
--CASE WHEN L.STOCKREF IN (SELECT STOCKREF FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE PROJECTREF=P.LOGICALREF AND TRCODE=1)
--THEN 'OPSIYONEL' ELSE 'STANDART' END END RECETE_TURU
CASE WHEN L.STOCKREF IN (SELECT STCREF FROM LG_123_STCOMPLN WHERE MAINCREF IN 
(SELECT STOCKREF FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE PROJECTREF=P.LOGICALREF AND TRCODE=1)) OR
 L.STOCKREF IN (SELECT STOCKREF FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE PROJECTREF=P.LOGICALREF AND TRCODE=1 AND LINENO_<>1)
 THEN 'OPSIYONEL' WHEN L.STOCKREF IN (SELECT STOCKREF FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE PROJECTREF=P.LOGICALREF AND TRCODE=1 AND LINENO_=1) THEN 'STANDART' ELSE  'STANDART' END END RECETE_TURU,
 P.CODE AS PROJE_KODU

FROM LG_123_01_STLINE AS L
INNER JOIN LG_123_01_STFICHE AS F ON F.LOGICALREF=L.STFICHEREF
INNER JOIN LG_123_ITEMS AS S ON S.LOGICALREF=L.STOCKREF
INNER JOIN LG_123_UNITSETL AS U ON U.LOGICALREF=L.UOMREF
INNER JOIN LG_123_PROJECT AS P ON P.LOGICALREF=L.PROJECTREF

WHERE F.TRCODE IN(25) AND L.SOURCEINDEX IN(2,11) AND  S.CARDTYPE=11

---AND S.CODE='GLDO1001Y001'
---AND P.CODE='G0255'

--8034

UNION ALL



------EKSILI OLAN 5 NOLU AMBAR---------------



select 
--L.SOURCEINDEX AS AMBAR,
YEAR(F.DATE_) YEAR_
,MONTH(F.DATE_) MONTH_
,F.DATE_ DATE_
,F.FICHENO FISNO
,P.CODE IS_EMRI_N0
,P.NAME IS_EMRI_ADI
,P.ENDDATE ENDDATE
,S.CODE STOK_KODU
,S.NAME STOK_ADI
,AMOUNT*-1 MIKTAR
,U.CODE BRIM
-----ESKI SON
--,CASE WHEN L.PRICE<>0 THEN L.PRICE ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE LINETYPE=0 AND STOCKREF=L.STOCKREF AND PRICE<>0 AND  TRCODE IN (50,1) AND DATE_<=L.DATE_  ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) END BRIM_FIYAT
--,CASE WHEN L.PRICE<>0 THEN L.PRICE ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE LINETYPE=0 AND STOCKREF=L.STOCKREF AND PRICE<>0 AND  TRCODE IN (50,1) AND DATE_<=L.DATE_  ORDER BY DATE_ DESC)  END*L.AMOUNT  TUTAR
------------------YENI
	,CAST(CAST(
	ISNULL
	(CASE WHEN 
	
	(sELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=S.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=1 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE CARDREF=S.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
	ELSE (sELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE STOCKREF=S.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=1 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) END ,0) AS  DECIMAL(18,2)) AS float)*-1 AS BRIM_FIYAT
	--
		,(CAST(CAST(
	ISNULL
	(CASE WHEN 
	
	(sELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=S.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=1 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE CARDREF=S.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
	ELSE (sELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE STOCKREF=S.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=1 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) END ,0) AS  DECIMAL(18,2)) AS float)*L.AMOUNT )*-1 TUTAR

---------------

,CASE SUBSTRING((SELECT CODE FROM LG_123_PROJECT WHERE LOGICALREF=L.PROJECTREF),1,2) 
WHEN 'G0' THEN 'GLADIATOR KABIN' 
WHEN 'G1' THEN 'GLADIATOR KABIN' 
WHEN 'R0' THEN 'RONIN KABIN'
WHEN 'RX' THEN 'RONIN XL'
WHEN 'FO' THEN 'RONIN KABINR'
WHEN 'F0' THEN 'FREDOOM'
WHEN 'T0' THEN 'TROY'
WHEN 'MC' THEN 'MOHICAN'
WHEN 'RV' THEN 'REVIVA'
WHEN 'GL' THEN 'GLADIATOR XL'
WHEN 'GL' THEN 'GLADIATOR XL'
WHEN 'PA' THEN 'PAN ANATOLIA' 
WHEN '20' THEN 'AKSESUAR' 
END TUR
,(SELECT MAX(MONTH(DATE_)) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE PROJECTREF=L.PROJECTREF AND TRCODE IN (7,8) ) SATIS_AY
,(SELECT MAX(YEAR(DATE_)) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE PROJECTREF=L.PROJECTREF AND TRCODE IN (7,8) ) SATIS_YIL
,CASE S.STGRPCODE WHEN 'ARABA' THEN 'ARABA' WHEN 'OTV' THEN 'OTV' ELSE
--CASE WHEN L.STOCKREF IN (SELECT STOCKREF FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE PROJECTREF=P.LOGICALREF AND TRCODE=1)
--THEN 'OPSIYONEL' ELSE 'STANDART' END END RECETE_TURU
CASE WHEN L.STOCKREF IN (SELECT STCREF FROM LG_123_STCOMPLN WHERE MAINCREF IN 
(SELECT STOCKREF FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE PROJECTREF=P.LOGICALREF AND TRCODE=1)) OR
 L.STOCKREF IN (SELECT STOCKREF FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE PROJECTREF=P.LOGICALREF AND TRCODE=1 AND LINENO_<>1)
 THEN 'OPSIYONEL' WHEN L.STOCKREF IN (SELECT STOCKREF FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE PROJECTREF=P.LOGICALREF AND TRCODE=1 AND LINENO_=1) THEN 'STANDART' ELSE  'STANDART' END END RECETE_TURU,
 P.CODE AS PROJE_KODU

FROM LG_123_01_STLINE AS L
INNER JOIN LG_123_01_STFICHE AS F ON F.LOGICALREF=L.STFICHEREF
INNER JOIN LG_123_ITEMS AS S ON S.LOGICALREF=L.STOCKREF
INNER JOIN LG_123_UNITSETL AS U ON U.LOGICALREF=L.UOMREF
INNER JOIN LG_123_PROJECT AS P ON P.LOGICALREF=L.PROJECTREF

WHERE F.TRCODE IN(25) AND L.DESTINDEX IN (5) AND  L.IOCODE=2  AND S.CARDTYPE<>11

--AND S.CODE='ELTS0099H070' AND P.CODE='RV029'


----YM İÇİN 5 NOLU AMBAR-------------------


UNION ALL

select 
--L.SOURCEINDEX AS AMBAR,
YEAR(F.DATE_) YEAR_
,MONTH(F.DATE_) MONTH_
,F.DATE_ DATE_
,F.FICHENO FISNO
,P.CODE IS_EMRI_N0
,P.NAME IS_EMRI_ADI
,P.ENDDATE ENDDATE
,S.CODE STOK_KODU
,S.NAME STOK_ADI
,AMOUNT*-1 MIKTAR
,U.CODE BRIM
-----ESKI SON
--,CASE WHEN L.PRICE<>0 THEN L.PRICE ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE LINETYPE=0 AND STOCKREF=L.STOCKREF AND PRICE<>0 AND  TRCODE IN (50,1) AND DATE_<=L.DATE_  ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) END BRIM_FIYAT
--,CASE WHEN L.PRICE<>0 THEN L.PRICE ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE LINETYPE=0 AND STOCKREF=L.STOCKREF AND PRICE<>0 AND  TRCODE IN (50,1) AND DATE_<=L.DATE_  ORDER BY DATE_ DESC)  END*L.AMOUNT  TUTAR
------------------YENI
	,CAST(CAST(
	ISNULL
	(CASE WHEN 
	
	(sELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=S.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=13 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE CARDREF=S.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
	ELSE (sELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE STOCKREF=S.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=13 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) END ,0) AS  DECIMAL(18,2)) AS float) *-1 AS BRIM_FIYAT
	--
		,(CAST(CAST(
	ISNULL
	(CASE WHEN 
	
	(sELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=S.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=13 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE CARDREF=S.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
	ELSE (sELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE STOCKREF=S.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=13 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) END ,0) AS  DECIMAL(18,2)) AS float)*L.AMOUNT)*-1  TUTAR

---------------

,CASE SUBSTRING((SELECT CODE FROM LG_123_PROJECT WHERE LOGICALREF=L.PROJECTREF),1,2) 
WHEN 'G0' THEN 'GLADIATOR KABIN' 
WHEN 'G1' THEN 'GLADIATOR KABIN' 
WHEN 'R0' THEN 'RONIN KABIN'
WHEN 'RX' THEN 'RONIN XL'
WHEN 'FO' THEN 'RONIN KABINR'
WHEN 'F0' THEN 'FREDOOM'
WHEN 'T0' THEN 'TROY'
WHEN 'MC' THEN 'MOHICAN'
WHEN 'RV' THEN 'REVIVA'
WHEN 'GL' THEN 'GLADIATOR XL'
WHEN 'GL' THEN 'GLADIATOR XL'
WHEN 'PA' THEN 'PAN ANATOLIA' 
WHEN '20' THEN 'AKSESUAR' 
END TUR
,(SELECT MAX(MONTH(DATE_)) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE PROJECTREF=L.PROJECTREF AND TRCODE IN (7,8) ) SATIS_AY
,(SELECT MAX(YEAR(DATE_)) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE PROJECTREF=L.PROJECTREF AND TRCODE IN (7,8) ) SATIS_YIL
,CASE S.STGRPCODE WHEN 'ARABA' THEN 'ARABA' WHEN 'OTV' THEN 'OTV' ELSE
--CASE WHEN L.STOCKREF IN (SELECT STOCKREF FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE PROJECTREF=P.LOGICALREF AND TRCODE=1)
--THEN 'OPSIYONEL' ELSE 'STANDART' END END RECETE_TURU
CASE WHEN L.STOCKREF IN (SELECT STCREF FROM LG_123_STCOMPLN WHERE MAINCREF IN 
(SELECT STOCKREF FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE PROJECTREF=P.LOGICALREF AND TRCODE=1)) OR
 L.STOCKREF IN (SELECT STOCKREF FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE PROJECTREF=P.LOGICALREF AND TRCODE=1 AND LINENO_<>1)
 THEN 'OPSIYONEL' WHEN L.STOCKREF IN (SELECT STOCKREF FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE PROJECTREF=P.LOGICALREF AND TRCODE=1 AND LINENO_=1) THEN 'STANDART' ELSE  'STANDART' END END RECETE_TURU,
 P.CODE AS PROJE_KODU

FROM LG_123_01_STLINE AS L
INNER JOIN LG_123_01_STFICHE AS F ON F.LOGICALREF=L.STFICHEREF
INNER JOIN LG_123_ITEMS AS S ON S.LOGICALREF=L.STOCKREF
INNER JOIN LG_123_UNITSETL AS U ON U.LOGICALREF=L.UOMREF
INNER JOIN LG_123_PROJECT AS P ON P.LOGICALREF=L.PROJECTREF

WHERE F.TRCODE IN(25) AND L.DESTINDEX IN(5) AND  L.IOCODE=2 AND  S.CARDTYPE=11

sample_data.STOK_ADI: BOILER TRUMA GAZLI SU ISITMA BG 10 10LT
